C[bunny.bunny: Not sure how this fight will go, but worth trying and learning
C[bunny.bunny: this is an interesting fight... I'm still not at all sure how it will turn out
bunny.bunny: I have a sense that it might not go very well for me, but I knew that when picking it..... good learning opportunity for me! :)
bunny.bunny: my lower left stones are feeling secure. they can either connect along the 2-line, or take eyes in the corner
bunny.bunny: ...but, I need to compress black's eye space
bunny.bunny: I assume g5 gets captured, but I need to ensure that is the only eye that black has
bunny.bunny: right now, there is *way* too much eye space
C[bunny.bunny: I can cut off black's dragon at k2 or g3
C[bunny.bunny: okay... I feel *very* foolish for not accounting for c2 move
bunny.bunny: time to review my options....
bunny.bunny: pretty sure I can cut with c6, but then black wins capture race if they poke out my eye with e5
bunny.bunny: well, let's see if black misreads the same way I did......
bunny.bunny: but if they do not, I'm a gonner
C[bunny.bunny: pretty sure I'm done for, but I'll play it out anyway
C[bunny.bunny: I really mis-stepped with that fight... a bunch of huge mis-reads
C[bunny.bunny: I am really not confident that I am reading this right, but here goes for another fight! :)
C[bunny.bunny: pretty sure I've lost this one, but I'd like to see if white responds to my stones in a way better than the ways I've already examined... all of which are not good for me :)
C[bunny.bunny: I think that this black path-of-attack will lead to ko, but not 100% sure
bunny.bunny: ...and I feel like black is going to gain something big off the ko... they have a lot of options here
